## Scope & Type

### Targets

## Check list

<!-- Please check all of the following before submitting your PR -->

- [ ] `No type errors` — Check with the following command: `npm run build` , ...
- [ ] `Clean codes` — e.g. lint check
- [ ] `Clean format` — e.g. `moon fmt` , `npx prettier --write src` , ...
- [ ] `Pass tests` — e.g. `moon test` , `npm run test` , ...
- [ ] `Build succeed` — e.g. `moon build` , `npm run build` , ...
